app.title: Civ V Access Installer
app.subtitle: Version {0}
app.heading: Civ V Access
welcome.heading: Welcome
welcome.notFound: Could not locate Civilization V automatically. Click Browse to choose your install folder.
welcome.invalidFolder: That folder does not contain CivilizationV.exe. Please choose the folder where Civilization V is installed.
welcome.bnwMissing: This folder does not have the Brave New World expansion installed. Civ V Access requires Brave New World.
profile.heading: How will you use Civ V Access?
profile.body: Choose the option that matches you. The installer remembers your choice and won't ask again.
profile.optionBlind: I'm a blind player playing the mod
profile.optionBlindDesc: Installs the full mod: speech support, accessible UI, audio-described cinematics, and the engine fork. About 110 MB.
profile.optionSighted: I'm a sighted partner joining multiplayer with a blind player
profile.optionSightedDesc: Installs only the engine fork and a stub DLC manifest, the minimum needed for multiplayer compatibility. No speech code runs on this machine.
check.heading: Checking for updates
check.contactingGitHub: Contacting GitHub for the latest release...
check.upToDate.heading: You are up to date
check.installFresh.heading: Ready to install
check.installFresh.body:
Civ V Access is not installed yet.
Latest release: {0}
check.updateAvailable.heading: Update available
check.unsupportedMajor.heading: Installer is too old
check.unsupportedMajor.body:
This installer can install Civ V Access {0}.x but the latest release is {1}.

Please download a newer installer from the project releases page.
check.networkError: Could not reach GitHub. Check your internet connection and try again.
confirm.gameRunning: Civilization V is currently running. Please close it before continuing.
progress.heading: Installing
progress.backingUpEngine: Backing up the vanilla engine DLL...
uninstall.heading: Uninstalling
result.installSuccess.heading: Install complete
result.installSuccess.body:
Civ V Access {0} is installed.

You can launch Civilization V now.
result.updateSuccess.heading: Update complete
result.updateSuccess.body:
Civ V Access has been updated to {0}.

You can launch Civilization V now.
result.uninstallSuccess.heading: Uninstall complete
result.uninstallSuccess.body: Civ V Access has been removed. Your Civilization V install is back to vanilla.
result.failed.heading: The install failed
error.adminRequired: The installer needs to run as administrator to write into the game folder. Right-click the installer and choose "Run as administrator".
error.assetMissing: The release does not contain the required component: {0}
error.gameDirNotFound: Civilization V install folder not found. Use Browse to point at it.
error.bnwRequired: Civ V Access requires the Brave New World expansion. The folder you chose does not have BNW installed.
